title: Wapol Reaches the Castle
description: On pages 12–15, this part focuses on wapol reaches the castle, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Wapol Reaches the Castle. Chopper’s grief meets Kureha’s harsh compassion as Hiriluk’s dream becomes a will that Chopper must carry forward. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.text: Personally, I couldn't care less about this crumbling piece of heap you call a castle...
